# v0.2.0 — Multi-machine sync

Tier 2: self-hosted or Ship Cloud sync via Rivet Actors. No account required if self-hosting.

## Theme

A single developer working across multiple machines gets seamless project state sync with zero git gymnastics. Teams get a self-hostable option with no data leaving their network.

## Features

- Rivet sync layer (multi-machine, self-hosted)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Two machines with the same project stay in sync without manual git push/pull
- [ ] Self-hosted Rivet works as a drop-in for Ship Cloud
- [ ] Tier 1 (local solo) still works with zero network, zero account
